overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path at night. The character passes a wooden barn and approaches a horse-drawn carriage in a rural farmland setting under a starry sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a large wooden barn with a warm light inside

notable_agents.action: horse standing near the barn entrance, partially illuminated

entered.detail: large rustic wooden barn with open entrance showing warm interior light
unpaved dirt trail cutting through tall grass
tall grass fields extending into the darkness on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open farmland at night, approaching a large wooden barn with a warm light glowing from within. A horse stands near the barn entrance to the right, and the starry sky is visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with scattered oak trees

events.description: passing the wooden barn and entering open farmland with distant hills visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path past the barn into open fields, heading toward distant terrain

entered.detail: large oak tree with dense canopy silhouetted against the night sky
rolling hills visible on the horizon under the starry sky

segments.scene_description: Having passed the barn, the character walks through open countryside with grassy fields on both sides. A large oak tree grows larger on the right as the camera approaches it, while distant hills become visible on the horizon.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past a stationary horse-drawn carriage parked on the right side of the path

notable_agents.action: stationary wooden horse-drawn carriage with harnessed horse standing still

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a stationary horse-drawn carriage parked on the right side of the dirt path. The large tree recedes behind as the camera continues forward, with open fields stretching into the distance under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path at night, transitioning from the warm glow of a farmstead into the vast openness of the moonlit countryside. It begins with the character approaching a large wooden barn where a warm light spills from within and a horse stands nearby under a starry sky. As the character passes the barn, the scene opens into wide grassy fields, with a massive oak tree looming larger on the right as distant hills emerge on the horizon. The camera then glides past a stationary horse-drawn carriage parked along the path, leaving the tree behind as the landscape expands into endless open fields stretching toward the dark horizon.
